items.name: Lexicon DJ — Essential (Lifetime)
items.notes: Lifetime license. List $199. Watch for seasonal sales (e.g. Black Friday, New Year promos).

items.name: Lexicon DJ — Ultimate (Lifetime)
items.notes: Lifetime license. List $399. Unlimited cloud storage is a separate monthly add-on (no lifetime option).

items.name: Milifortic S117 38mm Quartz Watch (Red Dial)
items.notes: Sapphire glass, VD78 quartz, 100M WR, nylon strap. List $233.98; AliExpress runs frequent flash sales/coupons (e.g. $20 off $109).

items.name: CADISEN Titanium TI-7 MULTISYNC Chronograph (Blue)
items.notes: Titanium case, VK63 mecha-quartz chrono, AR sapphire, canvas strap. List $214.18; store coupons common (e.g. $8 off $80).
